posts.thread_title: MDRN-Life Deuterium-Depleted Water Scam Warning
posts.author: rchu
posts.content: Hi All, I'm Jennifer.I was born and raised in Cleveland OH until around 13 years. It was definitely The Wild West back in the day. My dad was a drinker who loved rowdy places and woman! We lived in the Collinwood area of east Cleveland. My Childhood was colorful to say the least. I had 2 older sisters ()ne 5 years older than me, One just 1 year older than me than me). They were born with Cystic Fibrosis, a terminal illness. I have two younger brothers (One a year younger than me who drowned 14 years ago. We were like twins. One brother who is in and out of jail and prison most of his life. My family moved to Alabama because the mayor thought it would probably be best during all the violence going on. Alabama is a beautiful state with mountains north and the beach just south. I live in the northern region. Baci in 2016 was having health issues with what my DR said was hemorrhoids. This went on for 3 1/2 years to the point he told me I need to seek therapy. Landed in the ER and found out I had a tumor in my retum. Damn my DR. I have been battling the beast since then. Ironically during one of many visits he said you are just like me, we have hemorrhoids and have to deal with it. Well 3 years later he died of stomach cancer, Covid came along and the hospital my son went to for help with breathing. Instead he died from the hospital cocktaill. My son was a slow learner and they gave him a cocktail with him thinking they would help him. We were denied being his patient advocate, co…

posts.thread_title: My Teeth Are Dying - 2026
posts.author: Ava M
posts.content: I lived in Nanaimo from age 11-15, but I was too young to perceive any big health shifts. Though I have kept in touch with many high school friends I had there - and they’ve all aged AMAZING. They have a lot more vitality in face and body than my friends from other places in Canada, myself included in that unfortunately. So I do see that and it’s evidence that can’t be ignored. I’ve never known about the Karmusten Formation, incredible. Thank you for sharing that. I have read some parts of your journal and found your island entires very helpful while we’ve been considering this move. Even though I’ve lived there before, it’s been too long, and it’s really like moving somewhere totally unknown. Craving seafood bigtime, and I’d like for my whole family to do free diving lessons and learn spear fishing. To dive and forage my own scallops, that’s a goal. Thank you for the reply! Very hopeful to hear about the dentist in Vancouver as well. Good good good.

posts.thread_title: Magnetic Fields From Excess Ground Current
posts.author: SaigonTwin
posts.content: Jack, thank you for the gift. This is the kind of teaching/learning that transforms, on a massive scale. Having applied this knowledge you share for the past 2 years, I have observed the 100X uptick in dopamine availability that made this curious guy that much more curious to the point of being a pain in the ass to those around me. Teaching by example. Now I see very clearly the nearly absent sense of curiosity in those around me, and what it means regarding the fate of humanity. It's important for us (in my opinion) to heal ourselves so that we have the wherewithall to help others heal. And there are those who are still obliviously looking a gift horse in the mouth. It has been quite a hard lesson dealing with the non-curious and sometimes having to let them be. You have raised the bar for a standard that is probably over 100 years past due, and managed to simultaneously take ancient wisdom, contemporary knowledge, ripped open the box of suppressed and hidden gems, and projected it all into future implications. See ya in El Salvador.

posts.thread_title: Dental Abscess Molar #19
posts.author: Mat.I
posts.content: "If your cells no longer sense real light, if your dopamine is flatlined by artificial rhythms, if your mitochondria are drowned in noise instead of tuned to nature’s signals - you don’t malfunction, you disconnect. MK Ultra was never just a program - it was a prototype. When coherence is lost, so is agency. And in a low-dopamine state, the cage becomes comfortable. Every lost photon is a lost choice. This is how sovereignty is erased: not by chains, but by clocks that no longer receive solar input and are desynchronised by alien light (including the light you cannot see). Biology was never meant to survive in captivity. It was meant to resonate. Heal the charge. Feed the light. Or slowly forget who you are." Nothing good comes from convenience and comfort. Do not manage your WIFI use - eliminate it all together. Stop lying to yourself with "half" arsed truths to soothe your low dopamine Dunning Kruger actions. Nature does not give two f**** about your excuses. Be aware but not afraid of ultracrepidarianism - this can be common when learning, however the key is to own your gaps/limits, examine any assumptions made and use them to improve your knowledge base. Proof of Work = Redox of Civilization (where energy becomes truth & entropy pays rent to the truth)

posts.thread_title: Making DDW
posts.author: MTA321
posts.content: I thought about trying to build a system to create a continuous gradient for freeze fractionation to produce DDW but once you do the math the break even point for ~50-80ppm is around 5 years cost wise for materials vs just buying 50ppm DDW. There is promising potential with graphene membranes that utilize tunneling for fractionation but I think that was done on very small scales. I just wonder that if/when the cat is let out of the bag to the general population, the supply of DDW becomes scarce until it is more widely adopted by industry.

posts.thread_title: YOU'RE BEING LIED TOO.
posts.author: SusieQ
posts.content: I have managed to come off my HRT (Tibolone) which I took for 10 years - 48-58. I live in a rural part of the UK so I don’t have the same issues with nnemf’s. The things that helped the most were that I did a cold bath every day, ate lots of tinned sardines with nori seaweed, grounded every day, use a sauna daily, always got the sun rise and drank water with Celtic salt but cut down on caffeine. Also learnt self hypnosis to help with sleeping. Hope this helps.
